description: Write a Unity SerializedProperty for a View Binding. Provide either bindingId from bindings.json or a concrete target, plus the JSON value to write.

viewId.description: View id containing bindings.json, for example material-inspector.

target.description: Concrete binding target. Fields: kind, path, scenePath, objectPath, componentType, propertyPath.

value.description: JSON value to write to the SerializedProperty.
